display_policy.common_mobs: Use health bar only on hover, damage, or aggro to avoid screen clutter.
display_policy.dangerous_mobs: Use health bar visibility as the readable first layer; styled rank/name identity belongs to Ascendant Nametags while Health Bar Plus owns routine mob health.
display_policy.bosses: Let Enhanced Boss Bars or native boss bars own the main presentation.
display_policy.players_and_npcs: Use Guild rank, level, profession, and nameplate style; do not overload item rarity colors as rank labels.

validation.threat_tier_display_boundary: Policy-ready only; no new UI mod or overlay was added in this pass.
